title: Escape This
description:
Use the falling blocks and climb to next level to escape the evil clutches of The Entity. Make your way through puzzles, fight through 20 challenging levels, and defeat the dastardly bosses to free The Robot from a lifetime of misery.

In order to complete the puzzles and defeat the bosses, you must switch between two perspectives: Grid, and Robot. While in the Grid perspective, you can control falling block, and place them down in the grid area; once you've placed your blocks, you can switch to the Robot perspective and run, jump, and climb up to the next level!

Note: Image is from pre-alpha 0.0.1

Note: Image is from pre-alpha 0.0.1
description_short: A falling block puzzle platformer game with punishing bosses. Switch between two perspectives to rise to the top and escape the evil clutches of The Entity
